title: Usopp Boasts Before the Straw Hats
description: On pages 1–3, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hey Tamaneci! Did the pirates really go into this shop?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: But real pirates are savages, he might have been eaten....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: idiot! It's on/B&ABA that eats people!! Nin jin, you must be willing to die!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: This is going to be the most dangerous battle since we started the "USOPP pirate group"!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It can't be that... He's been eaten up....!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp Pirate
dialogue.text: What did you do to our captain usopp?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: WH... WHAT?! WHAT DID YOU DO....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Why are you looking at me?!!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
